cta.title: Book a meeting space
cta.subtitle: Hourly rooms for meetings and focused work

stepDate.title: When do you need the space?

stepSpace.title: Pick a space
stepSpace.empty: No spaces are available for online booking yet.

stepSlot.title: Pick a time
stepSlot.noSlots: No free slots for this duration. Try another day or a shorter duration.

stepIdentity.title: Your details
stepIdentity.errorRequired: Please fill in your name and a valid email.
stepIdentity.errorPartyTooBig: This space seats at most {capacity} people.
stepIdentity.errorSlotTaken: That slot was just taken. Please pick another time.
stepIdentity.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

stepSent.title: Request sent!
stepSent.body: {restaurantName} will confirm your booking by email shortly.
